hero.title: Net Worth Tracker
hero.description: Record private assets and liabilities, preserve balance history, and compare immutable snapshots by currency.

differences.title: Private records, not financial aggregation
differences.description: Track only values you enter without connecting accounts or claiming live valuations.

items.title: Assets and liabilities
items.description: Store non-negative balances with clear account types.

items.title: Historical snapshots
items.description: Captured values remain unchanged after live account edits.

items.title: Currency-safe differences
items.description: Review factual change without conversion or advice.

feel.title: Clear, factual, and private
feel.description: Every total follows explicit inclusion and archive rules.

items.title: Understandable
items.description: Assets, liabilities, and net worth stay clearly labelled.

items.title: Historical
items.description: Balance entries and snapshots preserve change over time.

items.title: Bounded
items.description: No bank linking, feeds, trading, scoring, or advice.

audiences.title: Who uses it
audiences.description: For people maintaining periodic personal financial records.

items.title: Individuals
items.description: Review manually recorded assets and debts.

items.title: Accounts
items.description: Assets and liabilities with inclusion and archive controls.

items.title: Snapshots
items.description: Immutable captured balances and currency-separated totals.

items.name: Included accounts
items.description: Only active included accounts affect totals.

items.name: Balance entries
items.description: Latest deterministic entry sets current balance.

items.name: Snapshots
items.description: Captured items never depend on future live values.

technicalSection.title: Isolated and owner scoped
technicalSection.description: Protected APIs preserve private records and historical integrity.
items: Backend Decimal arithmetic and generated contracts.
History-aware deletion and archived read-only rules.
